org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Class AbstractVectorialExporter<D extends AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D,S extends OutputStream>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporter<D,S>
  • Type Parameters:
    D - is the type of the graphics 2D supported by this implementation.
    S - is the type of the supported streams.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorialExporter
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EpsExporter, PdfExporter, SvgExporter

    public abstract class AbstractVectorialExporter<D extends AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D,S extends OutputStream>
extends Object
implements VectorialExporter
    Abstract implementation of a vector exporter.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected abstract S createStream(File currentFile, OutputStream stream)
      Wrap the specified stream to a stream that may be properly used by the exporter.
      protected abstract void finalizeExport(File currentFile, S stream, Rectangle2f documentBounds, D graphicContext)
      Invoked to finalize the export.
      protected File getFile()
      Replies the name of the file to output.
      FileCollection getFileCollection()
      Replies the collection of files that is used by this exporter.
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      boolean isShadowExported()
      Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      protected abstract D prepareExport(File currentFile, S stream, Rectangle2f documentBounds)
      Create the graphics context to use to export the data.
      void setFileCollection(FileCollection c)
      Set the collection of files that is used by this exporter.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setShadowExported(boolean export)
      Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      void write(File output, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(File output, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
      void write(OutputStream output, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(OutputStream output, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      • getFile

        protected File getFile()
        Replies the name of the file to output.
        Returns:
        the name of the file or null.

        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Specified by:
        getProgression in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

        public void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Specified by:
        setProgression in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • isShadowExported

        public boolean isShadowExported()
        Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Specified by:
        isShadowExported in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        true if the shadows of the objects are also exported.

      • setShadowExported

        public void setShadowExported(boolean export)
        Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Specified by:
        setShadowExported in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        export - is true if the shadows of the objects are exported.

      • setFileCollection

        public void setFileCollection(FileCollection c)
        Description copied from interface: VectorialExporter
        Set the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Specified by:
        setFileCollection in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        c - is the collection of files, or null if none.

      • getFileCollection

        public FileCollection getFileCollection()
        Description copied from interface: VectorialExporter
        Replies the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Specified by:
        getFileCollection in interface VectorialExporter
        Returns:
        the collection of files, or null if none.

      • write

        public <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(File output,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
        Specified by:
        write in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        output - is the output file
        graph - is the graph to write.
        container - is the container of figures to write.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public void write(File output,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
        Specified by:
        write in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        output - is the output file
        figures - are the figures to export.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public void write(OutputStream output,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
        Specified by:
        write in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        output - is the output stream.
        figures - are the figures to export.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(OutputStream output,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
        Specified by:
        write in interface VectorialExporter
        Parameters:
        output - is the output stream.
        graph - is the graph to write.
        container - is the container of figures to write.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • createStream

        protected abstract S createStream(File currentFile,
             OutputStream stream)
                                                throws IOException
        Wrap the specified stream to a stream that may be properly used by the exporter.
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the stream to wrap.
        Returns:
        the wrapping stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • prepareExport

        protected abstract D prepareExport(File currentFile,
              S stream,
              Rectangle2f documentBounds)
                                                                        throws IOException
        Create the graphics context to use to export the data.
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the output stream, never null.
        documentBounds - are the bounds of the document.
        Returns:
        the graphics context to use to export the data.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • finalizeExport

        protected abstract void finalizeExport(File currentFile,
                  S stream,
                  Rectangle2f documentBounds,
                  D graphicContext)
                                throws IOException
        Invoked to finalize the export.
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the output stream, never null.
        graphicContext - is the grapihcal context used to generate the vector picture.
        documentBounds - are the bounds of the document.
        Throws:
        IOException
